$schema: Manually curated list of agentic-engineering events. Add new entries here.

events.title: Nebius.Build/LONDON
events.description: Half-day technical gathering: distributed training, post-training, inference, agentic workflows, OpenClaw + Token Factory + Tavily hands-on.

events.title: HackwithSeattle
events.description: 8-hour hackathon at the AWS Skill Centre — Photon, RocketRide, and Nebius credits for builders.

events.title: Builders & Brews London
events.description: All-day builder hang with Tavily, Nebius, Zapier and Vercel. Real-world web-grounded agents.

events.title: Builders & Brews Berlin
events.description: All-day builder hang with Tavily, Nebius and n8n. Workshops + coffee + hands-on agent building.

events.title: Enterprise Agents Unleashed: Berlin Hackathon
events.description: Full-day hackathon: autonomous agents that transact, decide, execute. Tavily + Nebius + Gradium. Cash and credit prizes.

events.title: Applied Intelligence Hackathon
events.location: Frontier Tower, 995 Market St, San Francisco
events.description: One-day sprint at Frontier Tower. 'Agents That Act' — Nebius, Daytona, Tigris, Apify, Insforge as sponsors.

events.title: AI Engineer World's Fair 2026
events.description: The flagship AI-engineering conference. Code Agents track, MCP track, Evals track.

events.title: Agentic Engineering NYC Meetup
events.description: Monthly meetup on building, deploying, and operating coding agents.

events.title: Harness Engineering Workshop (Walking Labs)
events.description: Two-day intensive on harness engineering — the five-subsystem model, applied.

events.title: Agentic Engineering Amsterdam
events.description: Quarterly meetup for European agentic-engineering practitioners.

events.title: {Tech: Europe} Munich AI Hackathon
events.description: Weekend AI hackathon — 90 participants, Google DeepMind co-host, €5,000+ prize pool.

events.title: ICML 2026
events.description: International Conference on Machine Learning. Agentic eval and tool-use research.

events.title: SIGGRAPH 2026
events.description: Premier conference on computer graphics and interactive techniques. Increasing AI-agent and generative-media programming.

events.title: ClawCamp Oakland
events.description: Coding-agent unconference. Hands-on workshops on OpenClaw, harness engineering, sandboxes.

events.title: Code Agent Hackathon Singapore
events.description: Weekend hackathon. Teams ship a coding agent on a chosen sandbox + benchmark.

events.title: Open Source Agents Day
events.description: Day-long showcase of open-source agent frameworks: OpenHands, OpenCode, OpenClaw, Goose.

events.title: MCP Summit 2026
events.description: Model Context Protocol community summit — servers, clients, registries, security.

events.title: AI Engineer London 2026
events.description: European edition of the AI Engineer Summit. Strong agent-engineering track.

events.title: Anthropic Builders Summit
events.description: Annual Anthropic developer event. Claude Code, Agent SDK, and harness deep dives.

events.title: OpenAI DevDay 2026
events.description: OpenAI's annual developer conference. Agents SDK, Responses API, evals.

events.title: AI Engineer Tokyo 2026
events.description: Asian edition of the AI Engineer Summit.

events.title: AI Ascent (Sequoia)
events.description: Sequoia's invite-only AI summit. Talks frequently surface as 'Production AI' YouTube playlists.

events.title: Interrupt 2026 (LangChain)
events.description: LangChain's agent-engineering conference — production agents, observability, deployment.

events.title: NeurIPS 2026
events.description: Premier ML research conference. SWE-bench, Terminal-Bench, agent benchmark papers land here.

events.title: SWE-Bench Workshop (at NeurIPS)
events.description: Annual SWE-Bench evaluation results, new variants, methodology debates.

events.title: Agent Builder Day Berlin
events.description: One-day workshop + hackathon on production agent architectures.
